name: Arn Media Limited
analysis: A1N's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2550, stop A$0.2079, target A$0.2950 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
